hero.title: Mailbox Rentals
hero.subtitle: Your personal or business address - secure, private, and professional.

cta.body: A private mailbox with a real street address - perfect for small businesses, remote workers, and anyone who values their privacy.

addon.title: Mail Notifications
addon.description: Get notified when mail or packages arrive - via email or phone. $1/month added to your rental.

Mini.label: Mini Box
Mini.caption: Minimal volume, maximum savings
Mini.description: Perfect for individuals receiving minimal mail.

Personal.label: Personal
Personal.caption: Perfect for remote workers & vacations
Personal.description: Great for individuals with moderate mail volume.

Business.label: Business
Business.caption: Team-friendly with ample storage
Business.description: Ideal for small businesses with regular shipments.

Corporate.label: Corporate
Corporate.caption: Enterprise capacity, maximum flexibility
Corporate.description: Best for high-volume businesses needing extra space.

reservation.title: Reserve Your Mailbox
reservation.subtitle: Complete your info and we'll get you set up.

form1583.heading: USPS Form 1583
form1583.description: Required for all private mailbox rentals. You can fill it online or bring a printed copy.

requirements.heading: What to Bring In
requirements.intro: Complete your online form above, then visit us to finish your mailbox rental. You'll need:
items: Valid Photo ID (Driver's License, Passport, State ID)
Second ID (Utility bill, Bank statement, Insurance card)

reservation.legalText: Private mailbox rentals require identity verification per USPS regulations. Accepted payment methods: Cash, Check, Credit Card, Debit Card.
